case_title: YAO XUAN YU ET AL VS. JAIRO BAUTISTA JUAREZ

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,700.00 FILED BY YU, YAO XUAN YU, ANTHONY A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM YAO XUAN YU. AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, JAIRO BAUTISTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 68.50 - SERVED JUL-16-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, JAIRO BAUTISTA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JUAREZ, JAIRO BAUTISTA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---VIVIAN CHOW. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---SAUL CHAVEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, YAO XUAN YU, ANTHONY A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM YAO XUAN YU. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUAREZ, JAIRO BAUTISTA $7,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $143.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,843.50, YAO YUAN YU IS APPOINTED GUARDIAN AD LITEM ON BEHALF OF THE SON, ANTHONY YU, A MINOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
